headline: Finding solutions for your OOH needs!

experiences.title: Account Manager
experiences.description: •	Collaborates with the National Account Executives on all facets of client relations including but not limited to proposal completion, media plans and revenue objectives •	Up-Selling and leveraging business from new and established customer relationships •	Works cohesively with operations and clients to assist in developing effective advertising campaigns and managing said campaigns from start to finish •	Maintains a master inventory knowledge and continuously seeking growth in inventory, DMA’s and overall industry knowledge •	Works with all major US agencies to proactively and reactively inform them of inventory opportunities, changes and potential fits for their clientele

experiences.title: Associate Director
experiences.description: Managing a team of planners working on traditional, place-based and event-style out-of-home media. I currently work on various accounts such as Mazda, Starz, Chevron, Qualcomm, Universal Music Group, and Paramount Home Entertainment.

experiences.title: Outdoor Media Specialist
experiences.description: Out of home media planner specializing in traditional and place-based OOH media campaigns.
